All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractReportTemplate
Template Method base class for generating simple text reports.
AIHelper
Optional AI Helper utility class for advanced features.
AppConfig
Singleton pattern implementation for application configuration.
Appointment
Appointment entity with cloning support (deep copy).
AppointmentAnalyticsReport
Concrete report that demonstrates the Template Method pattern.
AppointmentListener
Observer interface for appointment notifications.
AppointmentNotFoundException
Exception thrown when an appointment is not found.
AppointmentService
Service class for managing appointments with Observer pattern integration.
AppointmentStatus
Enum for appointment status values.
Bill
Bill entity with Strategy pattern implementation.
BillFactory
Factory pattern implementation for creating different bill types with strategies.
BillFactory.BillType
Bill type enumeration.
BillingStrategies
Concrete billing strategies demonstrating Strategy design pattern.
BillingStrategies.DiscountedBillingStrategy
Discounted billing strategy - for bulk appointments.
BillingStrategies.EmergencyBillingStrategy
Emergency billing strategy - higher charges for emergency appointments.
BillingStrategies.PremiumBillingStrategy
Premium billing strategy - with service charge.
BillingStrategies.StandardBillingStrategy
Standard billing strategy - consultation + lab + medicine + tax.
BillingStrategy
Strategy interface for different billing strategies.
BillService
Service class for billing management with Strategy pattern implementation.
BillSummary
Immutable BillSummary entity representing an aggregated bill summary.
ConsoleNotificationListener
Console notification listener implementation.
Constants
Constants for the MediTrack application.
CSVUtil
Utility class for CSV file operations.
DataStore<T extends Searchable>
Generic DataStore for storing and retrieving entities.
DateUtil
Utility class for date and time operations.
DemoRunner
Comprehensive Demo Runner for MediTrack Application This demo showcases ALL features of the MediTrack system: 1.
Doctor
Doctor entity representing a healthcare professional with type-safe specialization.
DoctorService
Service class for managing doctors.
IdGenerator
Utility class for generating unique IDs.
InvalidDataException
Exception thrown when invalid data is provided.
Main
Clean entry point for MediTrack.
MedicalEntity
Abstract base class for all medical entities.
NotificationService
Notification service implementing Observer design pattern.
Patient
Patient entity with cloning support (deep copy).
PatientService
Service class for managing patients.
Payable
Payable interface for entities that can be paid.
Person
Abstract base class for Person entities (Doctor and Patient).
QuickDemo
Quick Demo - Minimal demonstration of core MediTrack features This is a simplified demo that shows the essential workflow: 1.
Searchable
Searchable interface for entities that can be searched by ID.
Specialization
Enum for medical specializations.
TestRunner
TestRunner for manual testing of MediTrack functionality.
Validator
Utility class for data validation.
